name: Reel Agent Bridge
description: Deterministic OpenClaw event bridge for Reel Agent callbacks

callbackSecret.label: Callback Secret
callbackSecret.help: Shared secret expected in X-Reel-Secret from Reel Agent

telegramAccountId.label: Telegram Account ID
telegramAccountId.help: Telegram account used for outbound Reel Agent notifications

workspaceStatePath.label: Workspace State Path
workspaceStatePath.help: Optional mirror file readable by the realtor-social workspace

repoRoot.label: Repo Root
repoRoot.help: Absolute path to the realtor-social repository on this machine

repoEnvPath.label: Repo Env Path
repoEnvPath.help: Optional .env path for Reel Agent backend credentials
